test_cases: Render MotivationalSatirical component and verify loading state displays 'Carregando frases...'
Mock successful fetch responses and verify motivational and satirical phrases are displayed correctly
Mock fetch failure and verify error message 'Erro ao carregar as frases.' is displayed
Verify Phrase component renders with correct title, text, and className props
Verify accessibility roles and aria-labels are correctly applied
Test responsiveness by simulating different viewport widths and checking CSS class effects
issues_found: No explicit handling of non-200 HTTP responses in fetch calls, which may cause unhandled errors
No tests for empty or missing 'phrase' fields in API response objects
No cancellation of fetch requests on component unmount (isMounted flag used but fetch not aborted)
recommendations: Add error handling for non-200 HTTP responses in fetch calls
Consider using AbortController to cancel fetch requests on component unmount
Add tests for edge cases such as empty or missing phrase fields in API responses
Add unit tests for Phrase component separately to ensure prop validation and rendering
